chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-698 of 2023 (Azhar Ali Chachar Vs. The State & others) 1. For Orders on MA No. 5892/2023 (U/A). 2. For Orders on MA No. 5893/2023(Ex./A). 3. For hearing of main case. 02-11-2023. Mr. Gul Feroz Kalwar, advocate for the applicant. >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application has impugned an order dated 25-09-2023 passed by Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Pano Akil whereby his application u/s 22 A/B Cr.P.C seeking direction against the police to record his FIR was dismissed. The occurrence of the incident alleged by the applicant is denied by the police in its report. The parties are appearing to be disputed over passage. Perhaps in these circumstances, learned Sessions Judge/Ex-Office Justice of Peace, Pano Akil dismissed the application of the applicant by way of impugned order directing him to avail the remedy for redressal of his grievance before appropriate forum, which is not found illegal to be interfered with by this Court by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application under section 561-A C.P.C, it is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nasim/P.A. 2
